meta.project: VALSEA / Sentinel Voice (Voice-to-Action Logistics & Sentiment Engine)

product_overview: A web-based multimodal voice intelligence dashboard that accepts pasted conversations, uploaded files, or live voice calls to produce transcript, emotion, security, intent, translation, and action recommendations for contact-center and enterprise workflows.
core_goals: Enable rapid ingestion of text, file, and audio inputs and produce structured conversational analysis (transcript, emotion, intent, security).
Provide a live VAPI-driven call experience to stream voice for near-real-time transcription and analysis.
Surface actionable guidance (whispers), fraud/security alerts, and cultural/translation context for agent decision making.
Support clear UI states for analysis progress, success, and error conditions with easy reset or retry paths.

features.name: Conversation Input Workspace
features.description: Accept and review conversational inputs: paste text, drag-and-drop or browse supported text/audio files, and verify editable text before starting analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Paste a conversation into the textarea -> Review the uploaded filename and editable text before analysis
Navigate to / -> Click Browse Files and select a local .txt or .json file -> See filename appear in the upload area -> Review and edit text before analysis
Navigate to / -> Drag and drop an unsupported file type (e.g., .exe) into the upload area -> See validation error indicating unsupported file type

features.name: Text Conversation Analysis
features.description: Submit pasted or typed conversation text to the analysis API and receive transcript, emotion gauges, security assessment, cognitive synthesis, and fraud verdict outputs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter or paste conversation text -> Click Analyze -> Observe animated analysis state -> Wait for analysis to complete -> Review the transcript, emotion gauges, security card, cognitive synthesis, and fraud verdict -> Click New Analysis -> See cleared input state

Navigate to / -> Enter or paste conversation text -> Click Analyze -> Observe animated analysis state -> See server error banner indicating analysis failed (e.g., missing GEMINI_API_KEY or Google credentials) -> Click Retry or check server configuration

features.name: Audio File Analysis
features.description: Upload an audio file which is transcribed (Google Cloud Speech-to-Text) then analyzed to produce the same VALSEA structured outputs (transcript, emotion, security, intent).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Browse Files and select a local audio file -> See filename appear in the upload area -> Click Analyze -> Observe transcription in progress -> Wait for transcription and analysis to complete -> Review the generated transcript and dashboard outputs

Navigate to / -> Upload an audio file -> Click Analyze -> Observe transcription step -> See error message indicating transcription or analysis failed (e.g., missing GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT_ID or credentials) -> See suggestion to check server environment variables

features.name: Real-Time Vapi Call Trigger
features.description: Start or stop a live Vapi-powered call session from the homepage to stream microphone audio into the VALSEA pipeline for near-real-time transcription and analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Start Live Voice Call -> Allow microphone/browser call permissions if prompted -> Observe connecting state -> Observe active call state -> Stop the live call -> See call stopped state
Navigate to / -> Click Start Live Voice Call -> Deny microphone/browser call permissions when prompted -> See permission denied banner and no active call state

Navigate to / -> Click Start Live Voice Call -> Allow microphone permissions -> Observe connecting state remain idle or show connection error -> See message indicating missing NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPI_PUBLIC_KEY or misconfigured Vapi and that live call cannot be established

features.name: Voice Intelligence Dashboard
features.description: Present the analysis outputs: transcript bubbles, emotion/prosody gauges, security/deepfake scores, intent synthesis, translation/cultural context, action-advised cards, and fraud verdict/alerts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit input (paste, file, or live call) and Click Analyze or start live call -> Wait for analysis to complete -> Read transcript bubbles for customer and agent turns -> Inspect frustration, anxiety, politeness, and confidence gauges -> Inspect deepfake score, risk level, and threat status -> Review intent, translation, cultural context, and action advised cards -> See fraud verdict banner if applicable
Navigate to / -> Click Analyze with no input provided -> See validation or empty-state message indicating no input and no results available -> Use provided controls to paste text or upload a file

Navigate to / -> Start live call (demo) -> Observe webhook acknowledgements but no downstream orchestration update -> See demo-only or placeholder messaging noting the webhook does not implement full function-call handling

routes.description: Main VALSEA analysis workspace for text, file, audio, and live-call driven voice intelligence analysis.

features.name: Conversation Input Workspace
features.description: Users can paste a dialog, drag and drop supported files, or browse for text or audio files before analysis.
user_interactions: Paste a conversation into the textarea
Drag and drop a .txt, .csv, .json, .log, or audio file into the upload area
Click Browse Files and select a local file
Review the uploaded filename and editable text before analysis

features.name: Text Conversation Analysis
features.description: Users can submit pasted or typed conversation text and receive structured emotion, security, intent, translation, and summary output.
user_interactions: Enter or paste conversation text
Click Analyze
Wait through the animated analysis state
Review the transcript, emotion gauges, security card, cognitive synthesis, and fraud verdict
Reset the flow with New Analysis

features.name: Audio File Analysis
features.description: Users can upload an audio file that is transcribed with Google Cloud Speech before Gemini returns the structured VALSEA analysis.
user_interactions: Upload an audio file
Click Analyze
Wait for transcription and analysis to complete
Review the generated transcript and dashboard outputs

features.name: Real-Time Vapi Call Trigger
features.description: Users can start or stop a live Vapi-powered call session from the homepage to stream a voice interaction.
user_interactions: Click Start Live Voice Call
Allow microphone/browser call permissions if prompted
Observe connecting and active call states
Stop the live call

features.name: Voice Intelligence Dashboard
features.description: The dashboard presents transcript, emotion gauges, security risk, intent synthesis, translation, cultural context, action advised, and fraud verdict.
user_interactions: Read transcript bubbles for customer and agent turns
Inspect frustration, anxiety, politeness, and confidence gauges
Inspect deepfake score, risk level, and threat status
Review intent, translation, cultural context, and action advised cards
Review the fraud verdict banner

known_limitations.issue: The live-call feature requires a valid NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPI_PUBLIC_KEY and compatible Vapi configuration to function.
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end live call testing may fail or remain in idle/connecting states without configured credentials.

known_limitations.issue: The analysis API requires GEMINI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT_ID, and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS at runtime.
known_limitations.impact: Text and audio analysis return server errors when these environment variables are missing or invalid.

known_limitations.issue: The webhook route acknowledges Vapi events but does not implement actual function-call handling or downstream workflow updates.
known_limitations.impact: Some real-time orchestration scenarios are UI/demo level only and may not complete full backend actions.
